title: Connect your TradingView Alerts to execute on your funded prop accounts
author: AtomikTrading
selftext:
[https://atomiktrading.io](https://atomiktrading.io/)  
I have created a web app that allows you to turn your TradingView alerts into trade signals directly to you prop accounts such as Apex etc. You do need to have the data set to Tradovate. I am still working on integrating rithmic data.

Copy trade the same signal up to 20 different accounts with each account having a different contract quantity.

If automation is not your thing, and you still wanna copy trade you could do so discretionarily.

All with absolutely no coding or messing with any json.

Additionally if you would like to share a strategy or subscribe to another users strategy you are able to within our marketplace.

Here is a video showing how it works.

[https://vimeo.com/1064116617/ab7841025c?share=copy](https://vimeo.com/1064116617/ab7841025c?share=copy)

Appreciate any feedback and dont hesitate with questions
